=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan October 11 1994 Flynn Theatre  Burlington, Vermont
In Like Flynn  (Montserrat  BRCD 1923 /24)

Silver cd>EAC (secure mode)>TLH (level 8)>Maketorrent>HC
artwork incluided  


cd-1
Jokerman 
If Not For You 
All Along The Watchtower 
I Don't Believe You 
Tangled Up In Blue 
Man In The Long Black Coat 
Mama You Been On My Mind 
Gates Of Eden 
Don't Think Twice 

cd-2
God Knows 
She Belongs To Me 
Maggie's Farm 
What Good Am I 
My Back Pages 

Bonus Tracks: 
Desolation Row (Acoustic) (1)
Joey(2)
Under The Red Sky (3)
License To Kill (4)
Highway 61 Revisited (5)
 
(1)Ahoy, Rotterdam, Holland June 15, 1998 
(2)El Rey Theater, LA, CA  December 19, 1997 
(3)Grugahalle, Essen, Germany  June 16, 1998 
(4)Brussels, Belgium  June 17, 1998 
(5)San Jose, CA  May 19, 1998
